payload.control_description: Demographic-aware recalibration layer that adjusts model confidence thresholds based on patient demographics. Combined with a safety guardrail that flags low-confidence predictions for mandatory human review.
payload.effectiveness_assessment: Recalibration reduces differential error rates from 8.2% to 2.7% across demographic subgroups. Safety guardrail captures 99.1% of cases where recalibrated confidence is below threshold.
payload.verification_method: A/B testing on held-out clinical data with demographic stratification
